---
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{fontspec}
  - \setmainfont[Script=Sinhala]{FreeSerif}
  - \usepackage{geometry}
  - \geometry{paperwidth=176mm, paperheight=250mm, margin=20mm, inner=25mm, outer=20mm}
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usetikzlibrary{calc}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \usepackage[document]{ragged2e}
  - \usepackage{microtype}
  - \definecolor{covercolor}{HTML}{1A3A3A}
  - \definecolor{accentcolor}{HTML}{F39C12}
  - \sloppy 
  - \hyphenpenalty=10000 
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyhead[LE,RO]{\thepage}
  - \fancyhead[RE,LO]{ගිම්හානයේ මට හමු වූ ජහිතා භවන්ති}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(tinytex.verbose = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
main
begin{titlepage}
\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
\fill[covercolor] (current page.south west) rectangle (current page.north east);
\node[anchor=center, text=white] at ((current page.center)+(0,6)) {\fontsize{22}{26}\selectfont \textbf{ගිම්හානයේ මට හමු වූ}};
\node[anchor=center, text=accentcolor] at ((current page.center)+(0,4)) {\fontsize{48}{55}\selectfont \textbf{ජහිතා භවන්ති}};
\node[anchor=center, text=white] at ((current page.center)+(0,1.5)) {\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont රතන සූත්‍රයේ ප්‍රායෝගික විදර්ශනාව සහ ස්කන්ධ විග්‍රහය};
\draw[accentcolor, line width=2pt] ((current page.center)+(-3,0))--((current page.center)+(3,0));
\node[anchor=south, text=white] at ((current page.south)+(0,4)) {\fontsize{14}{16}\selectfont \textbf{රචනය: චින්තක දේශප්‍රිය ගුණදාස}};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{titlepage}
\newpage
\justifying
m
